seo.keywords: Thamarai, Naanayam, James Vasanthan, Chithra, SPB, nan pogiren full lyrics, Naanayam songs lyrics, nan pogiren lyrics snippets, nan pogiren WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share nan pogiren lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'nanayam nan pogiren'?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Naanayam?

In Naanayam, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings and experiences related to love and connection.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of Chithra and SPB.

Who composed the music for 'nanayam nan pogiren'?

The music was composed by James Vasanthan, known for his soulful melodies.

When was the song released?

The song was released on January 30, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song nanayam nan pogiren from the movie Naanayam, the lyrical beauty penned by Thamarai intertwines with the soulful voices of Chithra and SPB. The song encapsulates the emotions of love and longing, creating a serene atmosphere that resonates with listeners. It serves as a poignant reflection of the characters' experiences in the film, evoking feelings of nostalgia and romance. The soothing melody, crafted by James Vasanthan, enhances the emotional depth, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: nanayam nan pogiren is a beautifully crafted duet that showcases the enchanting voices of Chithra and SPB, bringing a wave of nostalgia and romance. The collaboration of Thamarai's heartfelt lyrics and James Vasanthan's melodious composition creates a captivating experience for listeners. Dive into the emotional depths of this song from the movie Naanayam and let its soothing vibes resonate with your heart.
stanzaMeanings: I am going up slowly, the world is beneath me, like a gathering of stars above me. Like the water of a flower garden, my thoughts are blooming like a fragrant flower.
I came suddenly when I saw you, at that moment I had no choice but to see you. My heart asks questions about seeing you, but my heart also loves that moment...
I am going up slowly, the world is beneath me, like a gathering of stars above me. Like the water of a flower garden, my thoughts are blooming like a fragrant flower.
I came suddenly when I saw you, at that moment I had no choice but to see you. My heart asks questions about seeing you, but my heart also loves that moment...
Standing in front of the mirror, I speak alone. If someone asks who I am, oh no! I put my hand on my side and you came to me, oh no!
You also come to my house at this time. I made a garland for you. Even if I look for my own, it won't be found. It won't happen today, but still...
Na na na nan na nan na na
Hooo mmm.. Na na na nan na nan na na
If I need sleep, I won't give it. Even in dreams, you came with a false face. I searched for words and spoke, you are the seed that speaks in silence.
"The path that goes away has many changes. I went halfway without seeing. You came and said I am the treasure, I am standing here in this place."
I am going up slowly, the world is beneath me, like a gathering of stars above me.
Haaaaa aaaa Like the water of a flower garden, my thoughts are blooming like a fragrant flower.
Aaaa a a a aaa I came suddenly when I saw you, at that moment I had no choice but to see you. My heart asks questions about seeing you.
But my heart also loves that moment...
